description: Legal document in Hebrew. 16th-century. Yaʿaqov b. Faraj Allāh the Qaraite, known as Fayrūz, attests that he owes Moshe Ḥazzān b. Yiṣḥaq(?) a certain sum of muayyadis/medins. He will pay one medin a week. Dotan Arad estimates the dating of this fragment as 16th-century in the edition that appears in his dissertation (p. 353).
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
